name: Yvonne - The Spirit Who Longs for Revenge

descriptors: I am a restless spirit who can manipulate fire.
agenda: Get revenge on Adrien and all those who ignored my death
Set Paris ablaze with the fires of the dead

gifts.name: Spirit
gifts.description: Yvonne is in a spirit form and can only truly be damaged by magic. The touch of a Spirit absorbs life energy and inflicts 1 Wound. Physical protection and barriers cannot help against this Gift. If the Spirit is harmed by non-magical means, she still will suffer a Wound. However, when Yvonne has no Wounds left, she disappears and rematerializes immediately. In doing so, all her Wounds are healed, except those inflicted by magical means. Once per Scene, Yvonne can call 3 Restless Spirits to her who will obey her will.

gifts.name: Soul of Fire
gifts.description: Yvonne can manipulate fire at will. This Gift only affects a fire that is already lit. Manipulating fire, for Yvonne, is considered an additional action. The fire inflicts 1 Wound and if the Defense Check is an Outcome with a Cost, the target will continue to burn. During the following Exchange, if not put out, the fire will inflict 1 additional Wound. Thanks to her power, Yvonne can multiply the width and size of a flame by up to ten times.

system.background: A ragged little orphan who sold candles to survive on the streets of Paris. Scorned by all, even by the poor. Found compassion only in Father Adrien who offered her shelter. One evening she discovered Adrien's secret absinthe laboratory. Adrien strangled her unconscious, set her on fire, and threw her charred body in the catacombs. Many poor people witnessed the scene but stayed silent to keep Adrien's favor. Reborn as a vengeful spirit, Yvonne now torments those who were silent at her murder with maddening laughter and vicious whispers, then sets them ablaze. Saving Adrien for her grand finale - plans to burn all of Paris by igniting the Cemetery of the Innocents during the passage of comet Morituris on December 31st. During the day, remains near the place where she burned. Her body was found with only teeth intact, locked in a deathly grin. A small candle near her ashes remains miraculously untouched by flames.
system.notes: Tragic villain driven by righteous vengeance. Willing to negotiate but will not give up revenge on Adrien. Can be reasoned with if Hunters show compassion. Only one person (Olivier) remains on her list before Adrien.

flags.inspiration: The Little Match Girl (Hans Christian Andersen)
